nasb.text: It is by his deeds that a lad distinguishes himself If his conduct is pure and right.

esv.text: Even a child makes himself known by his acts, by whether his conduct is pure and upright.

cnv.text: 孩童的行動是否清潔正直， 憑他的行為就可以把他自己顯明出來。

ccb.text: 孩童的举动是否纯良， 都显明他的本性。

csbs.text: 就算是小孩子，也能藉着他的行为， 辨认出他的作为是否纯洁正直。
